/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libtvm_ffi_testing.so -o ../lib/libtvm_ffi_testing.so CMakeFiles/tvm_ffi_testing.dir/src/ffi/testing/testing.cc.o   -L/home/wangqx/work/mlc_llm_test/3rdparty/mlc_llm/3rdparty/tvm/lib  -L/usr/local/cuda/lib64  -Wl,-rpath,/home/wangqx/work/mlc_llm_test/3rdparty/mlc_llm/3rdparty/tvm/lib:/usr/local/cuda/lib64:/home/wangqx/work/mlc_llm_test/build/lib ../lib/libtvm_ffi.so
